description_long: This traffic barricade features a sturdy metal frame supporting three horizontal boards, each painted with alternating orange and white diagonal stripes for high visibility. At the top of the barricade, two round orange reflectors are mounted on either side, enhancing its effectiveness in low-light conditions. The frame consists of two vertical metal posts connected by three horizontal slats and stabilized by two wide, perpendicular support legs at the base. The orange and white striping is consistent across all boards, providing a clear visual warning to pedestrians and vehicles. The overall construction appears robust, with the metal frame likely providing significant weight and stability. The design is typical for urban roadworks, construction zones, or event crowd control, prioritizing both visibility and durability.
description: A metal-framed traffic barricade with three orange-and-white striped boards and two round orange reflectors on top, stabilized by wide support legs. Designed for high visibility and durability in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the barricade, with the round reflectors and horizontal boards visible in alignment.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the three orange-and-white striped boards and both round orange reflectors prominently.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the thin profile and the alignment of the boards and reflectors.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the three striped boards and the two round reflectors, with the support legs visible.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Three horizontal boards with diagonal orange and white stripes, stripes are of equal width and repeat across each board.
